/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libmelfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/srv/detail/gpio_configure__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/srv/detail/mode_configure__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/gpio_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/gpio_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/controller_type__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/melfa_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/melfa_msgs/msg/detail/control_mode__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
